zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Argentine於1318年4月出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾蕾托 維蒙德利時，他的父親John de Argentine41歲，母親Agnes Bereford18歲。他於1325年7月8日之後與Margaret Darcy結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1382年11月26日在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可海萊斯沃斯聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Argentine于1318年4月出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾蕾托 維蒙德利时，他的父亲John de Argentine41岁，母亲Agnes Bereford18岁。他于1325年7月8日之后与Margaret Darcy结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1382年11月26日在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可海萊斯沃斯聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Argentine was born in April 1318, in Little Wymondley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Argentine, was 41 and his mother, Agnes Bereford, was 18. He married Margaret Darcy after 8 July 1325. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 26 November 1382, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Halesworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Argentine est né en avril 1318, à Little Wymondley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Argentine, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Agnes Bereford, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Darcy après 8 juillet 1325. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 26 novembre 1382, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Church, Halesworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Argentine im April 1318 in Little Wymondley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Argentine 41 und seine Mutter Agnes Bereford 18. Er hat nach 8. Juli 1325 Margaret Darcy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 26. November 1382 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Mary's Church, Halesworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Argentine è nato il nel aprile 1318 nel Little Wymondley, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Argentine, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Bereford, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Darcy dopo il 8 luglio 1325. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 26 novembre 1382, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary's Church, Halesworth, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Argentineが1318年4月にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアリットル ウイモンドリーで生まれた時，父John de Argentineは41歳，母Agnes Berefordは18歳であった。1325年7月8日以後にMargaret Darcyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1382年11月26日に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクヘイレスウオルススト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary's, Halesworth, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헤일스워스 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John de Argentine(이)가 1318년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 리틀 윈이몽리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Argentine(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Bereford(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1325년 7월 8일 이후 Margaret Darcy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1382년 11월 26일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 헤일스워스 스트 마이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Argentine nasceu em abril de 1318, em Little Wymondley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Argentine, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Bereford, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Darcy após 8 de julho de 1325. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de novembro de 1382, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary's Church, Halesworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Mary's, Halesworth, Suffolk, England: ст мэри'с чурч, хэлесворт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Argentine родился апрель 1318 г. в местности литл вимондли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Argentine было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Bereford, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Darcy после 8 июля 1325 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 26 ноября 1382 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурч, хэлесворт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Argentine nació en abril de 1318, en Little Wymondley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Argentine, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Agnes Bereford, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Margaret Darcy después de 8 de julio de 1325. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de noviembre de 1382, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary's Church, Halesworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
